    x11-fonts/cozette: Update to 1.22.2

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/slavfox/Cozette/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#1222

    Added

        ∔ (U+2214 DOT PLUS)
        ∕ (U+2215 DIVISION SLASH)
        ∖ (U+2216 SET MINUS)
        ∛ (U+221B CUBE ROOT)
        ∜ (U+221C FOURTH ROOT)
        ∝ (U+221D PROPORTIONAL TO)
        ∟ (U+221F RIGHT ANGLE)
        ∠ (U+2220 ANGLE)
        ∡ (U+2221 MEASURED ANGLE)
        ∢ (U+2222 SPHERICAL ANGLE)
        ∣ (U+2223 DIVIDES)
        ∤ (U+2224 DOES NOT DIVIDE)

    PR:             273105
    Reported by:    laxul@pm.me (maintainer)
